steps.title: Understanding function values
steps.content: When an ordered pair $(a, b)$ is a solution to the equation $y=f(x)$, the definition tells us that $f(a) = b$. The $x$-coordinate becomes the input, and the $y$-coordinate becomes the output.

steps.title: Find f(6)
steps.content: The problem says the ordered pair $(6, 4)$ is a solution to $y=f(x)$. Using our understanding from Step 1, the input is 6 and the output is 4, so $f(6) = 4$. That matches Choice A — 4.
